sect1.title: Empowerment
sect1.para: Persons experiencing empowerment are autonomous and feel in control of their lives despite life stressors and complexities. The obtainment of empowerment during and after having experienced bullying should be the healthy goal of all impacted by The Hollow. The attainment of empowerment involves persons affected by The Hollow having insight into their situation and being able to clearly identify situations whereby the negative behaviors were encountered, as well as their participation in the toleration of the acts of bullying in absence of reporting the incidences to others. Persons who feel empowered are not victims but victors and are able to view negative behaviors directed at them as not being representative of whom they personally or professionally nor representative of the value or the talent and gifts they bring to the workplace.
